{W}{U} APEX CONTROL Get big. Sink your mana into game-changing apex abilities.
{U}{B} APEX SACRIFICE The bigger they all, the more you take advantage of their fall.
{B}{R} FOSSIL AGGRO Use nonland mana to race ahead of the curse aggressively.
{R}{G} FOSSIL STOMPY Fossil mana fuels your beatdown as you outsize your foe.
{G}{W} COUNTERS If big isn't big enough, +1/+1 counters can make it bigger.
{W}{B} APEX GRIND Let your smaller creatures die to advance the mad science of your apex beasts.
{B}{G} MONSTER TOUGHNESS Your monsters care specifically about toughness 5 or greater.
{G}{U} FOSSIL RAMP Get big mana. Spend big mana. Fossil costs are a breeze with your varied mana sources.
{U}{R} FOSSIL TEMPO Stay one step ahead of the game with cutting-edge mana sources saving you on costs.
{R}{W} MONSTER POWER Big power. Bigger power, even. Power 5 and up is all you need.
